query:
-- Step 1: Backfill waConversationId for messages that have NULL FK
-- Match by sessionId + remoteJid
UPDATE messages m
INNER JOIN wa_conversations wc ON m.sessionId = wc.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = wc.remoteJid
SET m.waConversationId = wc.id
WHERE m.waConversationId IS NULL;
